opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My period was late, the stick just turned positive, and my heart is racing so fast I can't catch my breath. I am terrified.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The home pregnancy test turned positive about an hour ago and I completely panicked — I don't know what to do and I can't calm down.

symptom_narrative.onset: the panic started about an hour ago right after the test turned positive; the period is 6 days late
symptom_narrative.duration: about an hour of racing heart and fast breathing; pregnancy symptoms over the last week
symptom_narrative.character: heart pounding, breathing fast, shaky and tearful, feeling terrified and overwhelmed
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: she says she can't cope, can't catch her breath, and is pacing and crying
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the racing feeling is in her chest; no belly pain
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the panic came on suddenly with the result; the nausea is worse in the mornings
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing yet — she says talking through it a little helps her breathe
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: thinking about the result and being alone tonight
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: mild morning nausea and tender breasts over the last week; no tummy pain, no bleeding
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: she doesn't mention having felt like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: too distressed to settle; pacing, crying, unable to relax at home tonight

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; has no one with her tonight for emotional support; the positive result was completely unexpected

objective_data_offered.value: the home urine test stick showed a positive line about an hour ago
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single self-administered home urine test, not confirmed by a clinician-run or serum test

objective_data_offered.value: heart racing, breathing fast, shaking, tearful and pacing
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient-described sensations during acute distress; not a measured vital sign
